## Checklist
<!-- Include a checklist to ensure all necessary steps have been completed before merging -->
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Documentation has been updated
- [ ] All tests are passing
- [ ] Code has been reviewed by team members
- [ ] Security considerations have been addressed
- [ ] Performance impact has been evaluated
- [ ] Breaking changes have been documented
- [ ] Database migrations (if applicable) have been tested
- [ ] Environment variables have been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline is passing
